title: Name Tag Crafting Backport (Shapeless)
description: Adds a shapeless name tag crafting recipe to older game versions (1.14-1.21.11)
body:
## Backport Name Tag Craft

Adds the name tag crafting recipe (introduced in *26.1 snapshot 2*) to older Minecraft versions.

✅ **FULL COMPATIBILITY!** Now works **ON ALL VERSIONS** (`1.14`-`1.21.11`)!

📄 **Features:**
- **Shapeless recipe**, meaning items can be arranged in any pattern in the crafting grid.

<details>
<summary>Crafting Recipes</summary>

![nametag craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e311a1dd4c838c33aa80cd6ef3d6e054e7efa300.png)
![nametagcraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1b8ad5537cf060cf13179c671508334d1c516d6.png)

For 1.21.9+

![nametag craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ddf400658e1beb473c72c208c4cc316563511dc.png)

</details>
